result.stderr:
mddox 0.15.0+420d51f9c4c620999f3567fedafb3e4a4a7cc3d8
Copyright 2019-2025 LoxSmoke

  -o, --output              Specify the name of the markdown output file.

  -f, --format              Specify the markdown file format. Valid values:
                            github,bitbucket,azure.

  --all-recursive           Step into all referenced assemblies recursively.

  -r, --recursive           Step into specified referenced assemblies
                            recursively.
                            Specify one or more assembly names separated by
                            spaces.

  --include                 The list of space-separated filters of things to
                            include in documentation.
                            Filter by access: subject.visibility
                            Subject is one of: [all, type, method, field,
                            property]
                            Visibility is one of: [all, public, protected,
                            private]
                            Example: all.public
                            
                            Filter by attribute:
                            subject.attribute.attribute_name
                            Subject is one of: [all, type, method, field,
                            property]
                            attribute_name is the name of the attribute.
                            Example: field.attribute.JsonIgnoreAttribute
                            
                            Filter by name: subject.name.wildcard
                            Subject is one of: [all, type, method, field,
                            property]
                            wildcard is a simple wildcard matching the name.
                            Example: type.name.Hidden*

  --exclude                 The list of space-separated filters of things to
                            exclude from documentation.
                            Syntax is the same as for include filters

  -m, --ignore-methods      [Deprecated] Do not generate documentation for
                            methods and constructors.
                            Useful for POCO documentation.

  -d, --method-details      Generate detailed documentation for methods and
                            constructors.
                            Setting has no effect if --ignore-methods is
                            specified.

  -a, --ignore-attribute    [Deprecated] Do not generate documentation for
                            properties with specified custom attribute(s).
                            For example JsonIgnoreAttribute
                            More than one space-separate attribute can be
                            specified.

  -t, --type                Document only the specified type and all types
                            referenced by it.

  -s, --msdn                Generate links to the specified version of MSDN
                            documentation for System.* and Microsoft.* types.
                            The documentation pages are located at this site
                            https://docs.microsoft.com
                            Possible versions can be latest, netcore-3.1,
                            net-8.0, or similar

  -i, --title               Document title string format. Use {assembly} and
                            {version} in the format string to
                            insert the name of the assembly and assembly
                            version.

  -n, --no-title            Do not write the "created by mddox at date" in the
                            markdown file.

  -c, --cmd                 Write command line used to generate the markdown
                            file.

  -v, --verbose             Print some debug info when generating documentation.

  -l, --language            Generate output using specified language. Available
                            languages: en-us, zh-cn

  --help                    Display this help screen.

  --version                 Display version information.

  assembly (pos. 0)         Required. The name of the assembly to document.

values.name: assembly
values.description: The name of the assembly to document.

options.description: Step into all referenced assemblies recursively.
Write command line used to generate the markdown file.

The list of space-separated filters of things to exclude from documentation.
Syntax is the same as for include filters
Specify the markdown file format. Valid values: github,bitbucket,azure.

[Deprecated] Do not generate documentation for properties with specified custom attribute(s).
For example JsonIgnoreAttribute
More than one space-separate attribute can be specified.

[Deprecated] Do not generate documentation for methods and constructors.
Useful for POCO documentation.

The list of space-separated filters of things to include in documentation.
Filter by access: subject.visibility
Subject is one of: [all, type, method, field, property]
Visibility is one of: [all, public, protected, private]
Example: all.public

Filter by attribute: subject.attribute.attribute_name
Subject is one of: [all, type, method, field, property]
attribute_name is the name of the attribute.
Example: field.attribute.JsonIgnoreAttribute

Filter by name: subject.name.wildcard
Subject is one of: [all, type, method, field, property]
wildcard is a simple wildcard matching the name.
Example: type.name.Hidden*
Generate output using specified language. Available languages: en-us, zh-cn

Generate detailed documentation for methods and constructors.
Setting has no effect if --ignore-methods is specified.

Generate links to the specified version of MSDN documentation for System.* and Microsoft.* types.
The documentation pages are located at this site https://docs.microsoft.com
Possible versions can be latest, netcore-3.1, net-8.0, or similar
Do not write the "created by mddox at date" in the markdown file.
Specify the name of the markdown output file.

Step into specified referenced assemblies recursively.
Specify one or more assembly names separated by spaces.

Document title string format. Use {assembly} and {version} in the format string to
insert the name of the assembly and assembly version.
Document only the specified type and all types referenced by it.
Print some debug info when generating documentation.
